name: Stop Playing Dumb! Are You a Cheater?
description:
𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁’𝘀 𝗚𝗼𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗢𝗻

Texas should be a goddamn desert, Dallas should be a nice place, college should be an unforgettable experience—and your university years are supposed to be the best time of your life!!

Well, forget about all of that for now, because there’s a killjoy around. In this case… a jealous little gremlin upset about what you have with a Latina girl you met during your first months of college, someone you slowly started spending more and more time with.

𝗔𝗯𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝗛𝗲𝗿

Mayra Márquez, 19 years old and Mexican-American. A college freshman majoring in Sports Science. Her family is comfortably wealthy in a modest way… and she also has a sibling named Miguel! Marcos really loves her, but he actually is just a little vindicative little shit.

𝗔𝗯𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝗬𝗼𝘂

Probably the only thing established about you is your age and the fact that you and her are friends. Beyond that, it’s entirely your choice whether you’re slightly older or whatever else you decide. Honestly, I don’t really care what direction you take—this is your story and your decisions.

𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼𝘀

- First intro: A direct confrontation. Marcos has been spreading bullshit about you, trying to poison Mayra’s mind with weird ideas and stupid rumors. Right now, she needs you to clear things up and tell her whether you’re actually a cheater or if this is all just a big-shitty-misunderstanding.

- Second intro: Similar to the first one, but this time you overhear Marcos talking directly about you, Ouch. Maybe some humiliation—or a few punches—might change his opinion about you, idk.

- Third intro: Left blank in case anyone wants to create their own scenario.

Another pic of my cat, but this time... huggin my sister cat!!
creator: shieri
